name: ExtensionTransport_Encounter
title: R5: Healthcare event during which this transport originated (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Transport.encounter` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Transport.encounter` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Encounter)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `Transport.encounter` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Encounter)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Transport.encounter` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.encounter` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Healthcare event during which this transport originated (new)
element.comment:
Element `Transport.encounter` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Transport` is not mapped.
Element `Transport.encounter` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: Healthcare event during which this transport originated
element.definition: The healthcare event  (e.g. a patient and healthcare provider interaction) during which this transport was created.
